results.title: Medium
results.content:
And then, in a quiet, coffee-fueled binge, I stumbled across YouTube video reviewing Glasp.co. At first glance, it looked like yet another note-taker with a fancy UI. I had tried something like it before and dropped it faster than a cold kebab. But this one? This one slapped.

2 minutes into the video (or one, if you’re watching on 2x like a proper psychopath), I was setting it up and feeding it my reading history like an overcaffeinated librarian on steroids.

## 7 Hours Later: Welcome to the Rabbit Hole

Here’s what I discovered after diving into nearly 7 hours of AI agent content like some kind of techno-monk with ADHD:

### 1. You don’t need to code. At all.

results.title: Why AI agents fail and how to fix them | K V S Dileep posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content: Your AI agent isn't broken—it's just designed in a wrong manner. I have been thinking a lot about AI agents, and wondering why some AI agents are so frustrating to work with. I saw the blog of AI code reviewer cubic.dev on how their initial version was ‘annoying’ the users. Their "intelligent" agent was flagging issues on patches with false alarms everywhere. Trust = zero. The problem wasn't the model or the prompt. They fixed their AI agent with a few insights. 🧠 Reasoning beats results every time - They forced their agent to emit reasoning / finding / confidence before speaking - Made bad logic visible, debuggable, fixable - 51% fewer false positives 🎯 Agents fail when they try to do everything - A single "do-everything" prompt is a disaster - Solution: Specialized micro-agents and

results.title: 10 Best AI Video Agent Providers Compared (2026) | Life Inside
results.content:
#### Best Use Cases

Sales and Marketing: Make your website an interactive conversation library. With the AI Video Agent, your site visitors can ask questions about your products and services and get personalized real-time replies to understand what they need. At relevant moments, the video agent can direct your visitors to schedule meetings, subscribe to newsletters, or progress in their customer journey.

Customer Support: Deliver instant, humanlike assistance on your site 24/7, with the AI Video Agent managing FAQs and walking users through processes. Reduce the burden on your support team with the help of over 60 languages offering you global reach. [...] ### 1. Life Inside AI Video Agent

Life Inside's AI Video Agent is the next generation of conversational AI, merging human-like video avatars with real-time AI intelligence to offer always-on engagement across your digital channels. Imagine having a friendly video assistant that has been specifically trained on your company's knowledge base, ready 24/7 to answer questions, direct visitors, and convert leads. It speaks in more than 60 languages. This is not just a chatbot. It is instead a real-time video avatar that looks, sounds and feels like a human being. It engages your audience in personalized rich context conversations that ensure engagement and real insight.

#### Key Features [...] #### Key Features

 Real-Time Conversational Video Avatar: It seamlessly enables video interactions by inserting a human-looking, AI-enabled agent into portals, websites, onboarding etc.

 Train Your Agent: You can train your agent based on your company content, documents, policies, manuals, and FAQs so that they provide accurate expert responses.

 Get Multi-Language Support: Automatically changes tone and language as per user needs while professing in 60+ supported languages.

 Real-Time Insights: Allows full reporting and optimization, tracking real audience questions, engagement, drop-offs, and content interactions.

 Select From the Avatar Library: Use ready-to-go interactive avatars or create your own as per your brand.

results.title: Can we fix this AI agent in 60 minutes? (Live builder Q&A)
results.content:
problem is I talk too much. Welcome to the
"AI Agent Clinic," where we work side by side
to triage your broken builds, untangle your code, and help
you get your agents production ready. Joining me in the clinic
today is Jacob Badish. Jacob, welcome to the show. JACOB BADISH: Thanks, Luis. Appreciate the time. This is awesome. LUIS SALA: So, Jacob, if
I understand correctly, you have no technical
expertise, and yet you built an agent by yourself. Tell us about it. JACOB BADISH:
Yeah, that's right. It's called Titanium. And I vibe coded this in
the evenings and weekends. I was blown away at
how doable it was. If I can do it,
anyone can do it. What Titanium does is it
finds certain executives at our customers and
partners, figures out pain points that [...] Engage directly with the builders live in the chat as you watch how they overhauled an AI agent in this packed 20 minute breakdown. Luis and Jacob will take a 60 minute race against the clock and distill it into the exact steps developers need to know. The video is pre-recorded, but the Q&A is live—drop your questions in the chat as we watch.

Do you want to be a guest on The Agent Clinic and have your agent fixed live? Submit your repo to: agent-clinic@google.com

This livestream originally aired on April 15, 2026 at 9:00 A.M. PST / 12:00 P.M. EST.
